testcase.classname: Environment Config should use default API URL when EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL is not set
testcase.name: Environment Config should use default API URL when EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL is not set

testcase.classname: Environment Config should use EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL when set
testcase.name: Environment Config should use EXPO_PUBLIC_API_URL when set

testcase.classname: alertasApi getAlertaById should fetch alerta by id
testcase.name: alertasApi getAlertaById should fetch alerta by id

testcase.classname: alertasApi marcarAlertaLeida should mark alerta as read
testcase.name: alertasApi marcarAlertaLeida should mark alerta as read

testcase.classname: alertasApi getNotificaciones should fetch notificaciones by usuarioId
testcase.name: alertasApi getNotificaciones should fetch notificaciones by usuarioId

testcase.classname: alertasApi marcarNotificacionLeida should mark notification as read
testcase.name: alertasApi marcarNotificacionLeida should mark notification as read

testcase.classname: alertasApi countNotificacionesNoLeidas should count unread notifications
testcase.name: alertasApi countNotificacionesNoLeidas should count unread notifications

testcase.classname: alertasApi registrarDispositivo should register device token
testcase.name: alertasApi registrarDispositivo should register device token

testcase.classname: alertasApi eliminarDispositivo should unregister device token
testcase.name: alertasApi eliminarDispositivo should unregister device token

testcase.classname: AuthStore hydrate should set authenticated status when token and user exist
testcase.name: AuthStore hydrate should set authenticated status when token and user exist

testcase.classname: AuthStore hydrate should set unauthenticated status when no token exists
testcase.name: AuthStore hydrate should set unauthenticated status when no token exists

testcase.classname: AuthStore logout should clear auth state and AsyncStorage
testcase.name: AuthStore logout should clear auth state and AsyncStorage
